title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Prestige Estates

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Prestige Estates
jsonLd.description:
We at Prestige Estates are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Prestige Estates:
Prestige Estates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Prestige Estates!
